channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Spacemen 3 turned repetition into divine meditation and the …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Spacemen 3 turned repetition into divine meditation and the wah-wah pedal into a church choir. Decades later, their influence continues to reverberate across rock’s outer limits.
item.content:encoded: Spacemen 3 turned repetition into divine meditation and the wah-wah pedal into a church choir. Decades later, their influence continues to reverberate across rock’s outer limits.

item.title: 👮‍♀️深田竜生（ACEes）も潜入捜査決定❗️👮‍♀️ 道枝駿佑（なにわ男子）主演ドラマ 「M.I.S.S…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
👮‍♀️深田竜生（ACEes）も潜入捜査決定❗️👮‍♀️

道枝駿佑（なにわ男子）主演ドラマ
「M.I.S.S.I.O.N.」特報＆追加キャスト公開
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681206?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

＜ドラマのあらすじ＞
道枝扮する刑事が、犯人が潜伏する大学へ潜入。正体を隠すべく女性の姿で捜査を進め、やがてミュージカルへ出演することになる。
item.content:encoded:
👮‍♀️深田竜生（ACEes）も潜入捜査決定❗️👮‍♀️

道枝駿佑（なにわ男子）主演ドラマ
「M.I.S.S.I.O.N.」特報＆追加キャスト公開
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681206?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

＜ドラマのあらすじ＞
道枝扮する刑事が、犯人が潜伏する大学へ潜入。正体を隠すべく女性の姿で捜査を進め、やがてミュージカルへ出演することになる。

item.title: MSG is suing Wired over their report that the company keeps …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: MSG is suing Wired over their report that the company keeps a database of LGBTQIA celebrities
item.content:encoded: MSG is suing Wired over their report that the company keeps a database of LGBTQIA celebrities

item.title: Flood sirens blared early Thursday in Comfort, Texas, as the…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Flood sirens blared early Thursday in Comfort, Texas, as the Guadalupe River rose more than 30 feet in three hours, the U.S. Geological Survey said. The storm could bring even more rainfall than last year's deadly Fourth of July floods. n.pr/4yi8LK6
item.content:encoded: Flood sirens blared early Thursday in Comfort, Texas, as the Guadalupe River rose more than 30 feet in three hours, the U.S. Geological Survey said. The storm could bring even more rainfall than last year's deadly Fourth of July floods. n.pr/4yi8LK6

item.title: The comments came following widespread reports earlier in th…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The comments came following widespread reports earlier in the week that those stops would be put on pause after two immigrants were fatally shot by ICE agents in early July. n.pr/4yqcC7T
item.content:encoded: The comments came following widespread reports earlier in the week that those stops would be put on pause after two immigrants were fatally shot by ICE agents in early July. n.pr/4yqcC7T

item.title: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen in healthcare in decades. But an NPR analysis finds drugmakers are only offering deals on a few of their medicines.
item.content:encoded: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen in healthcare in decades. But an NPR analysis finds drugmakers are only offering deals on a few of their medicines.

item.title: President Trump, who for years has sowed doubt about the sec…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump, who for years has sowed doubt about the security of American elections, is scheduled to give a primetime address Thursday night about election integrity. Trump has long contended, without evidence, that he won the 2020 election n.pr/4fFDB8c
item.content:encoded: President Trump, who for years has sowed doubt about the security of American elections, is scheduled to give a primetime address Thursday night about election integrity. Trump has long contended, without evidence, that he won the 2020 election n.pr/4fFDB8c

item.title: via @mprnews.org Gov. Tim Walz extends peacetime emergency…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
via @mprnews.org

Gov. Tim Walz extends peacetime emergency for wildfires in and around the Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness for 30 more days. The fires currently cover 55,000 acres.
item.content:encoded:
via @mprnews.org

Gov. Tim Walz extends peacetime emergency for wildfires in and around the Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness for 30 more days. The fires currently cover 55,000 acres.

item.title: Chloe Fineman Exits ‘SNL’ After Seven Seasons "That place i…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Chloe Fineman Exits ‘SNL’ After Seven Seasons

"That place is my home, and I know I'll never be too far away," the actress says.

Read: bit.ly/4aScwMs
item.content:encoded:
Chloe Fineman Exits ‘SNL’ After Seven Seasons

"That place is my home, and I know I'll never be too far away," the actress says.

Read: bit.ly/4aScwMs

item.title: "It is an old trick. When men abuse or attack women, society…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
"It is an old trick. When men abuse or attack women, society responds by restricting women. Don’t wear that skirt. Don’t walk home alone. Don’t leave your drink unattended.

"Now it’s: Don’t allow abortion pills to be mailed because a man might use them to commit a crime."

Commentary ↓
item.content:encoded:
"It is an old trick. When men abuse or attack women, society responds by restricting women. Don’t wear that skirt. Don’t walk home alone. Don’t leave your drink unattended.

"Now it’s: Don’t allow abortion pills to be mailed because a man might use them to commit a crime."

Commentary ↓

item.title: The World Cup final is set — and Shakira's 'Dai Dai' with Bu…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The World Cup final is set — and Shakira's 'Dai Dai' with Burna Boy is this year's banger anthem ahead of the big match.

item.content:encoded:

item.title: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil com…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans.
item.content:encoded: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans.

item.title: In 2002, Carlos Santana sought to follow up the massive succ…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
In 2002, Carlos Santana sought to follow up the massive success of ‘Supernatural’ with ‘Shaman,’ another Clive Davis-guided album pairing the guitarist with many of the era’s biggest stars. The lead single was “The Game Of Love,” and it’s got quite a history.

👉 stereogum.com/2505236/mich...
item.content:encoded:
In 2002, Carlos Santana sought to follow up the massive success of ‘Supernatural’ with ‘Shaman,’ another Clive Davis-guided album pairing the guitarist with many of the era’s biggest stars. The lead single was “The Game Of Love,” and it’s got quite a history.

👉 stereogum.com/2505236/mich...

item.title: From catalog-spanning deep cuts to $20 tickets for students,…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
From catalog-spanning deep cuts to $20 tickets for students, Jack White is playing some of the most thrilling shows of his career.

Here are seven reasons why you should see him right now ↓
item.content:encoded:
From catalog-spanning deep cuts to $20 tickets for students, Jack White is playing some of the most thrilling shows of his career.

Here are seven reasons why you should see him right now ↓

item.title: You could look at Foreign Tongues, the Rolling Stones' 25th …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: You could look at Foreign Tongues, the Rolling Stones' 25th album, as a tour of the group's musical variations. But it mixes reliable fun and remarkable energy with a generous attitude toward aging. n.pr/3TFP5Qr
item.content:encoded: You could look at Foreign Tongues, the Rolling Stones' 25th album, as a tour of the group's musical variations. But it mixes reliable fun and remarkable energy with a generous attitude toward aging. n.pr/3TFP5Qr

item.title: Robert Smith of @thecure.com shared some concise thoughts ab…

item.description: Robert Smith of @thecure.com shared some concise thoughts about the first-ever halftime show at the World Cup Final
item.content:encoded: Robert Smith of @thecure.com shared some concise thoughts about the first-ever halftime show at the World Cup Final

item.title: Eric Church’s Debut Album ‘Sinners Like Me’ Is Still Shaping…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Eric Church’s Debut Album ‘Sinners Like Me’ Is Still Shaping Country Music

Twenty years since its release, the LP continues to show how country can mirror real life, with songs about teen pregnancy, the death penalty, and bad decisions.

Read: bit.ly/4vKdx0I
item.content:encoded:
Eric Church’s Debut Album ‘Sinners Like Me’ Is Still Shaping Country Music

Twenty years since its release, the LP continues to show how country can mirror real life, with songs about teen pregnancy, the death penalty, and bad decisions.

Read: bit.ly/4vKdx0I

item.title: Ambient folk musician Hana Stretton has two more brilliant r…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Ambient folk musician Hana Stretton has two more brilliant recordings out today, "Seagull Theory II" and "As It Was Before This"
item.content:encoded: Ambient folk musician Hana Stretton has two more brilliant recordings out today, "Seagull Theory II" and "As It Was Before This"

item.title: Mick Jagger: "If someone wants to make music by AI, go ahead…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Mick Jagger: "If someone wants to make music by AI, go ahead. But it has to be original."

The Rolling Stones also gave their impression of Olivia Rodrigo's rock music in a new interview.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Mick Jagger: "If someone wants to make music by AI, go ahead. But it has to be original."

The Rolling Stones also gave their impression of Olivia Rodrigo's rock music in a new interview.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: These Brazilian progressive rock albums experimented with so…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: These Brazilian progressive rock albums experimented with sound as a way to dream of freedom, hope, and the possibility of a new world, despite the censorship of the time.
item.content:encoded: These Brazilian progressive rock albums experimented with sound as a way to dream of freedom, hope, and the possibility of a new world, despite the censorship of the time.

item.title: It's the first known instance of officials investigating sus…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: It's the first known instance of officials investigating suspected insider trading on a prediction market from inside the White House. n.pr/3TFgqlK
item.content:encoded: It's the first known instance of officials investigating suspected insider trading on a prediction market from inside the White House. n.pr/3TFgqlK

item.description:
Just in:

It's the first known instance of officials investigating suspected insider trading on a prediction market from inside the White House.

It's the first known instance of officials investigating suspected insider trading on a prediction market from inside the White House.

item.title: Nathaniel Rich's literary thriller centers on a young couple…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Nathaniel Rich's literary thriller centers on a young couple who strike out against a data center. Cloudthief wraps a smart exploration of our data-dominated society inside an entertaining heist yarn. n.pr/4pq25Wo
item.content:encoded: Nathaniel Rich's literary thriller centers on a young couple who strike out against a data center. Cloudthief wraps a smart exploration of our data-dominated society inside an entertaining heist yarn. n.pr/4pq25Wo

item.title: Israeli rapper and singer Noga Erez and her partner Ori Rous…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Israeli rapper and singer Noga Erez and her partner Ori Rousso on the documentary ‘Noga,’ the pressures of war and backlash, and the personal cost of staying visible as Israeli artists.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Israeli rapper and singer Noga Erez and her partner Ori Rousso on the documentary ‘Noga,’ the pressures of war and backlash, and the personal cost of staying visible as Israeli artists.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Goth rock’s roots weren’t entirely gloomy. Meet the early-’8…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Goth rock’s roots weren’t entirely gloomy. Meet the early-’80s punks who traded nihilism for mysticism, optimism, and a darker path toward personal growth.
item.content:encoded: Goth rock’s roots weren’t entirely gloomy. Meet the early-’80s punks who traded nihilism for mysticism, optimism, and a darker path toward personal growth.

item.title: For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Foo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Football Confederation made it past the first knockout round, winning only three games out of 29. Asian teams are competitive — up to a point. n.pr/4aUIZBE
item.content:encoded: For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Football Confederation made it past the first knockout round, winning only three games out of 29. Asian teams are competitive — up to a point. n.pr/4aUIZBE

item.title: Timothy Busfield told an Albuquerque grand jury that he can …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Timothy Busfield told an Albuquerque grand jury that he can no longer find work because he’s supposedly been “canceled” after being indicted on child sex offenses.

Details ↓
item.content:encoded:
Timothy Busfield told an Albuquerque grand jury that he can no longer find work because he’s supposedly been “canceled” after being indicted on child sex offenses.

Details ↓

item.title: Introducing two new features, now available on Bandcamp: htt…

item.title: Fellow '120 Minutes' hosts Matt Pinfield and Jim Shearer fon…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Fellow '120 Minutes' hosts Matt Pinfield and Jim Shearer fondly remember Dave Kendall, the creator and host of the hugely influential MTV show who has died.

Access the free article here: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Fellow '120 Minutes' hosts Matt Pinfield and Jim Shearer fondly remember Dave Kendall, the creator and host of the hugely influential MTV show who has died.

Access the free article here: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: The Odyssey feels like a prism through which Nolan's earlier…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Odyssey feels like a prism through which Nolan's earlier films can be understood. A downbeat realist by nature, Nolan imbues the epic with a fascinating tension between fantasy and skepticism. n.pr/44RTySN
item.content:encoded: The Odyssey feels like a prism through which Nolan's earlier films can be understood. A downbeat realist by nature, Nolan imbues the epic with a fascinating tension between fantasy and skepticism. n.pr/44RTySN

item.title: At the launch party for his new web series, the Academy Awar…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
At the launch party for his new web series, the Academy Award-winning musician, filmmaker, and producer built on a long-running social experiment: bringing strangers together over a shared game and seeing what happens next.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
At the launch party for his new web series, the Academy Award-winning musician, filmmaker, and producer built on a long-running social experiment: bringing strangers together over a shared game and seeing what happens next.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
